t_ch: 拜托，{NICKNAME}，什么都不用做。你能来和我聊聊，我已经很高兴了。
t_en: Please, {NICKNAME}. There really is no need for anything. Just coming to chat with me is cause enough for celebration.

t_ch: 孩子以年龄不符的老成姿势托腮想了片刻。
t_en: The boy cups his chin in thought for a brief moment in a pose that is beyond his age.

t_ch: 如果你真心想帮我做点什么的话……
t_en: If you really are sincere about helping me with something...

t_ch: 就带我去仙舟的集市里转转，买些吃的，到处玩玩吧！医生们不总是喜欢在病情无可救药时对病人家属说「想吃什么就吃什么，带他到处玩玩」吗？
t_en: Just take me for a spin around the market, buy me some snacks, and have some fun with me! Don't doctors always say that when a terminal case is hopeless to "Take them out to eat whatever they want, and go around and have fun"?

t_ch: 在我变成一个真正不谙世事的婴儿之前，我想纵情快乐一下。
t_en: I want to have one last good time before I turn into a mindless baby.

t_ch: 我想吃点甜的！
t_en: I want something sweet!

t_ch: 咱们走吧！
t_en: Let's go!

t_ch: 貘馍卷！鸣藕糕！琼实鸟串！来看看哎！
t_en: Tuskpir wrap! Songlotus cake! Berrypheasant skewers! Come and get 'em!

t_ch: 说来可笑，考察仙舟文化时，我竟然从没留意过这些街头小吃。学会对那些烟火气浓重、却无利可图的东西向来是不感兴趣的。
t_en: It's silly, but when I was researching Xianzhou culture, I never paid attention to these street snacks. The Guild never had much time for ordinary knowledge unless they were profitable.

t_ch: 想吃什么？
t_en: What'll it be?

t_ch: 劳烦你去替我——
t_en: Can you please ask for me...

t_ch: 哦不对，应该是……
t_en: Oh, no it should be...

t_ch: 我想吃琼实鸟串！我就是想吃琼实鸟串！给我买点尝尝嘛？
t_en: I want berrypheasant skewers! I just want berrypheasant skewers! Can you please get me some?

t_ch: 是不是这样？
t_en: Is that okay?

t_ch: 不用特意奶声奶气！
t_en: Quit being so childish!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，语气没拿捏好，没办法，老夫我不当小孩太多年，说话难免有些不习惯，你体谅下吧。
t_en: Hehe, I can't help putting on this tone. I haven't been a child for so long that I'm not really used to speaking. Forgive me.

t_ch: 想吃什么自己买！
t_en: Buy whatever you want yourself!

t_ch: 什么？我还以为你刚才说要帮我做些什么是真心的？结果还是老夫自己掏钱吗？
t_en: What? I thought you were sincere about wanting to help me do something? But now you're asking me to fork out for it?

t_ch: …我、我不！我不嘛！我就要你买给我！我就要吃琼实鸟串！
t_en: ...I, I won't! I won't do it! I want you to buy it for me! I want to eat a berrypheasant skewer!

t_ch: 年轻人，这是你弟弟吗？这孩子长得真可爱，你可不能对弟弟这么粗声粗气说话，会吓着小孩的。
t_en: Young {F#woman}{M#man}, is this your little brother? He's so cute. You can't be so harsh like that to a kid, or you'll scare him.

t_ch: 听见了没？
t_en: Hear that?

t_ch: 买来了吗？
t_en: Did you buy it?

t_ch: 来，拿着。
t_en: Here, take it.

t_ch: 好…我尝尝……
t_en: Alright... Let me have a taste...

t_ch: 孩子将红彤彤的糖串放进嘴里，一口一个。
t_en: The boy places the bright red candies into his mouth, one at a time.

t_ch: 哈，真甜啊。
t_en: Ha, it's so sweet.

t_ch: 大部分人这一生除了童年外，少有无忧无虑的快乐。成长、求学、工作…不停追逐这追逐那。
t_en: Most people rarely get to enjoy such a carefree feeling, except in childhood. Growing up, studying, working... Always chasing this or that thing.

t_ch: 这么一想，长生种的日子还真是没有盼头啊…他们是怎么忍受几百年如一日无休无止的重复生活的？
t_en: Thinking about it like this, doesn't living like a long-life species seem hopeless... How can they put up with the endless repetition of life for hundreds of years?

t_ch: 对他们来说，生活应该就像我嘴里这颗糖，起初甜蜜，片刻就消失的无影无踪，只留下空落落的渴望。
t_en: For them, life should be like this candy here in my mouth. Sweet at first, but then soon disappearing without a trace just to leave behind nothing but empty desire.

t_ch: 嘻嘻，我竟然梦寐以求一直想成为他们。
t_en: Teehee, and in spite of everything I always dreamed of becoming one of them.

t_ch: 孩子咂咂嘴，意犹未尽。
t_en: The boy smacked his lips, craving more.

t_ch: 吃完了。接下来该去哪儿呢？我想…去长乐天瞧瞧！
t_en: All finished. Where should we go next? I wanna... go to the Exalting Sanctum!

t_ch: 孩子一溜烟跑得不见踪影了。
t_en: The boy vanished without a trace.

t_ch: 还没…买…
t_en: I haven't... bought that... yet...

t_ch: 你在磨磨蹭蹭什么啊，老夫可等不起你。快点快点，琼实鸟串！琼实鸟串！
t_en: Quit dilly-dallying, this old timer can't wait around for you all day! Quickly, c'mon! Berrypheasant skewers! Berrypheasant skewers!

t_ch: 说起来，我可去过很多地方
t_en: Speaking of which, I've been around the block, y'know...

t_ch: 庇尔波因特、翁瓦克、泰科铵…
t_en: Pier Point, Vonwacq, Taikiyan...

t_ch: 还有吃喝不停的宴会之星！
t_en: And Banquet Star, where you never stop eating!

t_ch: 嗯嗯！
t_en: Uh-huh!

t_ch: ……等你长大了可一定要到仙舟外面瞧瞧哦！
t_en: ...Once you grow older, you simply have to step off the Xianzhou to take a look at the cosmos outside!

t_ch: 嗯嗯！
t_en: Uh-huh!

t_ch: 我去过庇尔波因特、翁瓦克、泰科铵、还有朋克洛德…哦对了，你那么喜欢品尝美食，一定要去宴会之星看看！
t_en: I've been to Pier Point, Vonwacq, Taikiyan, and even Punklorde... By the way, if it's a foodie paradise you're after, then you simply have to check out Banquet Star!

t_ch: 嗯嗯！
t_en: Uh-huh!

t_ch: 对了，小朋友，我以前在这附近没见过你呀。
t_en: By the way, kid, I haven't seen you around here before.

t_ch: 我却见过你哦，白露大人。
t_en: I've seen you before though, Lady Bailu.

t_ch: 唉唉，用不着这么拘礼。本小姐跑出来的时候就是个与民同乐的食客。初次见面，你袋袋里就没带着点零食什么的，快快献上大家一起口福同享？
t_en: Please, no need for formalities. I came out here just to be another diner among the people. You don't happen to have any snacks in your bag, do you? Why don't you share with us what you've got?

t_ch: 对不住了，本来有根琼实鸟串，不过眼下都被我吃光了。
t_en: I'm sorry. I had a berrypheasant skewer but I already ate it all up.

t_ch: 啊，这也太没劲了。不过不打紧，我明天还在这附近玩儿，你可以带上吃的来这儿找我。
t_en: Oh, that's a pity. No matter, I'll be playing nearby here tomorrow, so you can bring me something to eat and come here.

t_ch: 小神医，你好啊。
t_en: How's it going, O miracle doctor?

t_ch: 是你啊，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
t_en: Oh it's you, {F#Miss}{M#Sir}.

t_ch: 陶德先生，咱们该走了…
t_en: Mr. Todd, we should get going...

t_ch: 陶德…先生？
t_en: Mister... Todd?

t_ch: 你就不能把我当个孩子看？让听到了，会有心理阴影的。
t_en: Can't you just treat me like a kid? If other people hear it, they'll be traumatized.

t_ch: 别自说自话到处乱跑行吧？
t_en: Just stop talking to yourself and running off, okay?

t_ch: 哎呀，我的监护人来了，咱们之间的秘密谈话今天就到这儿吧。
t_en: Oops, here comes my guardian. That's enough of our secret conversation for today, then.

t_ch: 好啊，你明天要记得带零食来喔。
t_en: Alright, remember to bring some snacks with you tomorrow.

t_ch: 你带着陶德告别了白露。
t_en: You take Todd to bid farewell to Bailu.

t_ch: 你现在越来越有家长的样子啦。跑到别的小孩面前，把自家的孩子抓走。
t_en: Now you're starting to get the hang of this parenting business. Running over to other kids and snatching away your own child.

t_ch: 说起来，这样的情景在我小时候也经常发生啊。每当我想和邻家扎着辫子的小姑娘一起玩耍时，我的父母就会像闹钟一样准时出现，把我带回书桌前。
t_en: Speaking of which, this kind of thing used to happen all the time when I was a kid. Whenever I wanted to play together with the pig-tailed girl next door, my parents would show up like an alarm clock and march me back to my desk.

t_ch: 我一直在想，要是那时候他们不总是出现打扰咱们，也许我现在该是十几个孩子的爷爷了……
t_en: I always wondered, what if they weren't always bothering me like that? Perhaps I'd have sired several grandchildren by now...

t_ch: 别想这些有的没的了…
t_en: Don't think about what could have been...

t_ch: 你还想去哪儿？
t_en: Where else do you want to go?

t_ch: 还真是噩梦重现呀，让人一丁点儿玩耍的心情也没有了。
t_en: It's a real nightmare. Man did it seriously kill my mood for playtime.

t_ch: 接下来，该是去波月古海边吹吹风的时候了。
t_en: Next up, let's go to Lunarescent Depths when it's windy.

t_ch: 小小的孩子孤零零地坐在海边。
t_en: The little boy sits alone beside the sea.

t_ch: 你还好吧？
t_en: Are you all good?

t_ch: 我很好，听听海浪的声音，望着这片海，我从未如此清醒过。
t_en: I'm fine, just listening to the waves and watching the ocean. I've never felt so wide awake.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我感到很满足。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I feel happy.

t_ch: 我这一生比大部分不知自己所求，又无法得偿所愿的人强太多了。我著书立说，我授徒无数。虽然没有孩子，但我的学生中有不少让我颇为骄傲。
t_en: In this life I've been far better off than most people, who don't even know what they want, let alone how to get it. I became a published author, and I've taken on countless apprentices. I may have no children, but there are several of my students of whom I'm rather proud.

t_ch: 最重要的是，我活着完成了自己的研究结果，得到了学士们所追求的答案——虽然它更像一个恶劣的玩笑。
t_en: Best of all, I lived to see the results of my research and got the answers to what all the scholars were vying for — despite it all turning into a nasty joke.

t_ch: 那么，最后向你道声谢，{NICKNAME}，自始至终你都从旁见证着我。
t_en: So finally it's time for me to say thanks to you, {NICKNAME}, for being there for me right from the start.

t_ch: 对了，我把自己的实验数据都记录下来了，想怎么处理，转交给我的弟子也好，销毁它也罢，甚至是给仙舟人…一切都由你处置。
t_en: By the way, I've recorded all the data from my experiments here — whether you want to pass it on to my apprentices, destroy it, or even hand it over to the Xianzhou authorities... The choice is yours.

t_ch: 突然想到老师他最后的归宿，就是在这片古海里与鱼共游吧…而我，也会迎来这样的结局吗？
t_en: It suddenly occurred to me that my teacher's final moments were spent swimming here with the fish in these ancient waters... And what of I? Will I also face such an ending?

t_ch: 问题没有答案，小小的孩子不再言语。
t_en: The question went unanswered, and the child spoke no further.

t_ch: 走吧，{NICKNAME}，留我一个人静静吧。
t_en: Go, {NICKNAME}. Leave me be here.

t_ch: 孩子望向海水，口中哼哼着谁也听不懂的童谣。
t_en: The child gazes back at the sea, humming a nursery rhyme that nobody can understand.

t_ch: 他偶尔察觉到你的存在，好奇地看向你，但很快却无法集中注意力，又被奇异的景观夺去了心神。
t_en: Every now and again, he seems to notice you and he looks on with curiosity. But before long, he can no longer concentrate as he's distracted by the fantastical landscape.

t_ch: 大海似在呼唤着孩子。
t_en: The sea seems to be calling for the child.

t_ch: 你不知陶德未来有何打算，但你隐隐感到你们的命运仍有交汇之处。
t_en: You're not sure about Todd's future plans, but you somehow feel that your destinies will still intertwine somewhere.

t_ch: 没想到，陶德的研究成功了。他胆子可真不小……
t_en: Surprisingly, Todd's research was successful. He's got some guts...

t_ch: 这家伙准备躲哪儿去呢？又打算怎么离开仙舟呢？<color=#dbc291ff>等着瞧，也许用不了一日，他又该来求我帮忙了</color>吧？
t_en: Where is this guy planning to hide, and how does he intend to leave the Xianzhou? <color=#dbc291ff>Let's wait and see — he might come asking for my help again in less than a day.</color>

t_ch: 梁沐…我，我必须见到他！
t_en: Liangmu... I must see him!

t_ch: 半夏，你的魔阴身征兆越发明显了。我葫芦里还有些安神药，要不要喝一点再走？
t_en: Banxia, your symptoms are getting worse... I have some soothing tonic in my gourd. Would you like some before we set off?

t_ch: 谢谢你，白露大人…但是，不能再继续耽误下去了。
t_en: Thanks, Lady Bailu... but we can't delay any longer.

t_ch: 流云渡不就是一个码头吗？
t_en: Isn't Cloudford a dock?

t_ch: 病重的人不该在医馆里吗？
t_en: Is this really the best place for the sick?

t_ch: 是我让梁沐躲在这儿的，我不能让「药王秘传」的人找到他，只好让他躲进流云渡的集装箱里。
t_en: I told Liangmu to hide in a Cloudford shipping container.— I couldn't let the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus find him.

t_ch: 为什么药王秘传的人会知道他？
t_en: Why would the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus know him?

t_ch: 因为我向梁沐承诺，要给他带去长生不老药。要让他和我一样，成为仙舟人。
t_en: Because I promised Liangmu I'd bring him an elixir of immortality... to make him one of the people of the Xianzhou, like me.

t_ch: 你不知道那是仙舟律法中不赦十恶之一吗？
t_en: You know that's one of the Xianzhou's Ten Unpardonable Sins, right?

t_ch: 我知道，可那时我对「药王秘传」的内幕一无所知，只知道丹鼎司内部，有些人在复现古老的秘药。
t_en: Yes... but I knew nothing about the treachery of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus back then. I only knew that people in the Alchemy Commission were involved in ancient, clandestine medicines.

t_ch: 但是我错了。那根本不是长生赐福，甚至连「拙劣的模仿」都称不上……
t_en: But I was wrong. It wasn't a blessing of immortality, not even a poor imitation...

t_ch: 人被变成了…怪物，对吧？
t_en: ...They were turning humans into monsters, weren't they...

t_ch: 那些疯子只把短生种视作入药的材料，可消耗的实验品。
t_en: Short-life species are expendable to those maniacs — they use them in experiments to develop their medicines.

t_ch: 留给我的时间不多，就只剩下最后一味「药」了。
t_en: I don't have much time left, and I only have one solution left...

t_ch: 衔药龙女。
t_en: The Healer Lady.

t_ch: 没错。
t_en: That's right.

t_ch: 戴葫芦的矮个子小姑娘。
t_en: The short girlie carrying a gourd around.

t_ch: 喂！
t_en: Hey!

t_ch: …呵呵，没错。
t_en: ...Hehe, that's right.

t_ch: 白露大人，你还记得我们的「交易」对吧？
t_en: Lady Bailu, you still remember our deal, right?

t_ch: 你帮我逃出丹鼎司，我会帮你救人。
t_en: You help me escape the Alchemy Commission, I save your sweetheart.

t_ch: 谢谢你，白露大人。我们约定好的地方就在那边，走吧。
t_en: Thank you, Lady Bailu. The place we arranged to meet up is ahead. Let's go.

t_ch: 我不能，我不能忘记他……我必须到那里。
t_en: I can't... I can't forget him... I must get there.

t_ch: 糟了，她开始胡言乱语了。
t_en: This is bad. She's starting to lose touch with reality.

t_ch: 安神药怕是没用了，得、得放电！
t_en: The soothing tonic might not work anymore. This calls for... shock treatment!

t_ch: …怎么会，他去哪儿了？我们说好了就在这里……
t_en: How can that be? Where is he? We agreed to meet here...

t_ch: 头好疼…怎么会？
t_en: M—My head... How can that be?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}快帮忙，让她先在这里休息一下，我来想点办法。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, let her rest here for a while. I'll think of something.

t_ch: …先不要乱动，半夏。
t_en: ...Try not to move, Banxia.

t_ch: 可是，他、他没在这里，我们还得找到他……
t_en: B—But he's not here. We still need to find him...

t_ch: 医护！冷静！
t_en: Nurse! Get a hold of yourself!

t_ch: 听医生的安排！
t_en: Doctor's orders!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，能拜托你在附近找找有没有什么线索吗？半夏姐姐的心上人应该不会无缘无故地离开的。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, can you see if there are any clues nearby? I don't think Banxia's sweetheart would leave for no reason.

t_ch: 交给我吧。
t_en: Leave it to me.

t_ch: 也许已经遭遇了不测。
t_en: Maybe something bad happened to him...

t_ch: 拜托，别再说这些刺激人的话啦！
t_en: Hey, we've got company, remember!?

t_ch: 难道你们没有手机吗？
t_en: dO yOu GuYs NoT hAvE pHoNeS?

t_ch: …你是想说玉兆对吧？咱们从丹鼎司逃出来时情况紧急，哪有时间带上。
t_en: ...Are you talking about jade abacuses? We escaped the Alchemy Commission in a hurry — didn't have time to bring them.

t_ch: 病患这边就交给我了，毕竟我才是丹鼎司的衔药龙女嘛！
t_en: Leave the patient to me — I'm the Healer Lady of the Alchemy Commission, after all!

t_ch: （以这个区域为中心，找找周围有没有什么留下的线索吧。）
t_en: (Let's start with this area and see if we can find any clues nearby.)

t_ch: 梁沐是个是怎样的人？
t_en: What's Liangmu like?

t_ch: 他比长生种有趣得多…
t_en: He's much more interesting than a long-life species...

t_ch: 继续说话，继续回忆他…
t_en: Tell me, what do you remember...

t_ch: （看起来那人被药王秘传的爪牙追踪，不得不转移了位置。）
t_en: (It looks like Banxia's sweetheart was tracked by the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus and had to switch location.)

t_ch: （去告诉那两个人吧。）
t_en: (I should go and tell Banxia and Bailu.)

t_ch: 别动…让我擦一下药膏。
t_en: Stay still... this ointment will help.

t_ch: 那一天，病人们都躺下了，我却看到他不停画着一片树林。我问他，不好好休息还在做什么？
t_en: There was a day when all the other patients were lying in bed, but I found him painting a forest. I told him he was supposed to be resting.

t_ch: 他说：「我想去看一眼翁瓦克的树海。为了完成想做的事情，我必须不停去画那看不见的未来。我一定要治好自己，就算锒铛入狱、被驱逐出境。」
t_en: He said, "I want to see the vast forests of Vonwacq one day... and to make a dream a reality, you must paint an invisible future. I must get well by any means, even if it means jail or exile."

t_ch: 我从来没有过自己想做的事，只是日复一日地从事着医护工作。
t_en: I never had anything I wanted to do. I just got on with my nursing work, day in and day out.

t_ch: 有时候我会想，就这么快进到下一个一百年吧，生活实在是太无聊、太琐碎了，直接快进到生命结束都没问题。
t_en: Sometimes I'd feel like a century was a pointless, trivial blink of an eye... and that it wouldn't matter if it was all over by the next blink.

t_ch: 我不想知道那些年里发生了什么难熬的事情，我没有兴趣知道自己这一生经历了什么，反正都是些琐碎的事。
t_en: I wasn't interested in anything that had happened to me up to then — the things I'd experienced. None of it mattered...

t_ch: 听到梁沐说话的那一瞬间，我突然很悲伤。人一生的时光不该是这样的，至少不应该连这段时间的拥有者都对它无所谓。
t_en: ...but the moment I heard Liangmu's words, I suddenly felt sad. A person shouldn't feel that way about their life... They shouldn't be indifferent to the time they own.

t_ch: 梁沐…让我睁开了眼睛。我的眼里，他闪闪发光。
t_en: Liangmu... he opened my eyes. He was like a shining star.

t_ch: 对不起，这种情感，我不太明白。
t_en: Sorry, I don't quite understand this feeling.

t_ch: 大人…为何一直想逃离丹鼎司呢？您不喜欢治病救人吗？
t_en: My lady... why do you always run away from the Alchemy Commission? Don't you like treating people?

t_ch: 我…天生就有治病救人的本事。但你问我喜欢不喜欢，我实在答不上来。
t_en: I... It's true I was born with a gift for healing... but as for whether I like it or not, I couldn't tell you.

t_ch: 打记事起我就在学医，从来没人问过我喜欢不喜欢，持明族那些老东西们不在乎，我也不在乎。
t_en: I've been studying medicine for as long as I can remember. Nobody's ever asked me whether I like it. Those old Vidyadhara fools don't care, and neither do I.

t_ch: 治疗就像是吃饭喝水一样，实在是没有感觉，非要说的话，是讨厌？
t_en: Treating others is like eating and drinking for me. I don't have any feeling towards it. If I had to choose, I think I'd say I hate it...

t_ch: 不过要是治好了一个人，那个人能变得更好更健康的话，我喜欢！所以，你给我快快振作起来！
t_en: But I like it when someone gets better after I treat them! So you need to pull yourself together!

t_ch: 疼——好像…能够理解您了…
t_en: Argh... I think... I can understand you...

t_ch: 怎么样，本小姐拜托你找的线索呢？
t_en: Any clues have you found?

t_ch: 怎么样，有眉目了吗？
t_en: What happened? Did you find any clues?

t_ch: （提交捡到的留言）
t_en: (Hand over the note you picked up.)

t_ch: 咳咳咳…这里已经被药王秘传盯上了吗？
t_en: *coughing* ...The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus already had their eye on this place?

t_ch: 他没事就好。咱们…接着走……
t_en: *sigh* I just hope he's okay. Let's... keep walking...

t_ch: 不行，你知道自己现在是什么状况吗？你放心，我会找到梁沐，医好他的。{NICKNAME}你把半夏送回星槎海的医馆去。
t_en: No way. Do you know how bad your condition is? Don't worry, I'll find Liangmu and treat him. {NICKNAME}, send Banxia back to the apothecary in Starskiff Haven.

t_ch: 不，正是因为我非常清楚自己是个什么情况，我改主意了…我想再见他最后一面。
t_en: No, I know exactly how bad my condition is. That's why I've changed my mind... I want to see him one last time.

t_ch: 你会帮我的吧？
t_en: You'll help me, right?

t_ch: 对了，{NICKNAME}，还有一件事要拜托你。你见识过魔阴身有多危险，要是真到了那个时候…请你一定要保护好龙女大人。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I have a favor to ask you. You've seen for yourself how dangerous the mara-struck can be. If the time comes... please protect the Dragon Lady.

t_ch: 我不会手下留情的。
t_en: I'll do what I must.

t_ch: …听你这么说，我就放心了。
t_en: ...Thank you, I'm glad to hear you say that.

t_ch: 刚才我就注意到了，这附近有好多药王秘传的爪牙。
t_en: I caught sight of a lot of disciples in the area just now.

t_ch: 出了我这样的叛徒，想必他们也坐不住了。
t_en: I'm a traitor to them... They won't stand idly by if they lay eyes on me.

t_ch: 要是你们抵挡不了，就把我交给他们…
t_en: If you can't fend them off... Just let me go with them...

t_ch: …清理叛徒用得着这么多人吗？
t_en: ...Does one traitor require so many people?

t_ch: …白露大人…我不行了。
t_en: Lady Bailu... I can't go on anymore.

t_ch: 哼，他根本没有在这里等我们，难道说又躲到别的地方了吗？
t_en: Ugh, he isn't waiting for us here. Did he hide somewhere else?

t_ch: 白露大人，小心！
t_en: Lady Bailu, watch out!

t_ch: 我在这里等到了你，就意味着紫夷失手了。哦，这不是龙女么，你这是想将功补过的意思吗？
t_en: There you are! Ziyi clearly failed then. Oh, and if it isn't the Dragon Lady... Trying to make up for past sins, are we?

t_ch: 看来留在这里守株待兔是没有错的，半夏妹妹，可算是在这里等到你了。哦，你还带来了衔药龙女，这是打算将功补过的意思吗？
t_en: Waiting here for you works well, Banxia. Our patience gets rewarded! Oh, I see you've brought us the Healer Lady. Trying to make up for the lost time?

t_ch: 呸呸呸！补你个大头鬼！你个欠收拾的药罐子，看本小姐我一尾巴抽到你爹妈认不出来！
t_en: Blah, blah, blah — I've heard enough out of you already! If it's a beating you want, allow me to do the honors!

t_ch: 小小丫头，我一会儿再收拾你。来人，先把这个叛徒拿下，一定要从她身上把名单搜出来。
t_en: I'll deal with you in a moment, little girl. Men! Take the traitor and make sure you get the list from her.

t_ch: 休想得逞。
t_en: Don't even think about it.

t_ch: 假装我不存在是吧？
t_en: Am I invisible to you or what?

t_ch: 你不说话，我真当你不存在了。你又是哪位呀？
t_en: Hmph, it felt that way until you opened your trap. Who are you?

t_ch: 好汉饶命！
t_en: Please spare me!

t_ch: …你这是求饶的样子吗？冲我背后作揖干什么！
t_en: ...Is that how you beg for mercy? What the heck are you doing?

t_ch: 人呢，怎么还不动手啊！
t_en: Where is everyone? Seize them!

t_ch: 汝…是在对吾下令？
t_en: ...Are you giving me an order?
You...

t_ch: 十王圣断。
t_en: Karmic atonement.

t_ch: 十王司的判官？！
t_en: A Ten-Lords Commission judge!?

t_ch: （这十王司的判官好厉害，可是半夏你……）
t_en: (This Ten-Lords Commission judge packs a punch! But Banxia, you—)

t_ch: （嘘，她要是察觉了我的征兆，一定会动手的。）
t_en: (Shh, if she notices my symptoms, she won't hesitate.)

t_ch: 「药王秘传」为何对汝等紧追不放？
t_en: Why are the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus pursuing you?

t_ch: 我们只是一般路过的游客。
t_en: We're just passing tourists.

t_ch: 游客？
t_en: Tourists?

t_ch: 我们是丹鼎司的救护小队。
t_en: We're an Alchemy Commission rescue squad.

t_ch: 此二人身着丹鼎司服色。
t_en: I only see two of you in Alchemy Commission attire.

t_ch: 那个女孩，把头抬起来。神色游移，眸焦涣散…莫不是有了魔阴身的征兆？
t_en: You, girl — raise your head. You have a wandering look in your eyes... A mara-struck look, perhaps?

t_ch: 救、救命啊判官大姐姐！我们前不久才从被封锁的洞天里逃出来…那、那群坏家伙紧咬着咱们不放，这位医护小姐怕得都站不稳啦。
t_en: H—Help us, Miss Judge! We only just managed to escape before the delves were locked down... Those evil men have been chasing us — this nurse is so scared she can barely stand!

t_ch: 报告，雪衣大人，在流云渡西南方发现了药王秘传的残党！
t_en: Madam Xueyi, the remnants of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have been found in the southwest of Cloudford!

t_ch: 此处不安全，汝等最好立刻离开。
t_en: This place isn't secure. You should leave immediately.

t_ch: 士兵！速速将彼等送走！
t_en: Soldiers! See them on their way!

t_ch: 在云骑军的护送下，你们被带到了流云渡较为安全的地方。
t_en: Under escort of the Cloud Knights, you were taken to a safer place in Cloudford.

t_ch: 十王司的判官，真是怪人一个。半夏姐姐你没事吧？
t_en: That's the strangest judge I've ever come across... Banxia, are you alright?

t_ch: 哈…呼……都已经到了这一步了，我是不会回去的，一定得见到他最后一面。
t_en: Ha... phew... I made it this far... I won't go back without seeing him one last time.

t_ch: …我们走这边，看看能不能绕过那些云骑军。
t_en: ...Let's go this way and see if we can avoid those Cloud Knights.

t_ch: 前方有持械恶徒，闲杂人等返回城区避难。
t_en: There are armed villains up ahead. If you're not on duty here, return to the city for your own safety.

t_ch: 那是云骑军、还有药王秘传。
t_en: There are Cloud Knights and Disciples of Sanctus Medicus over there.

t_ch: …已经顾不上他们了。
t_en: ...We don't have time for them.

t_ch: 唔…嗯……
t_en: *groaning*

t_ch: 他就在那扇门后边…明明就差一点。
t_en: He's right behind that door... We're almost there.

t_ch: 但是那儿有云骑军守着…等等，本小姐想到了一个主意。
t_en: But there are Cloud Knights stationed there... Wait, I have an idea.

t_ch: 该去教训一下挡路的家伙了。
t_en: About time we taught some roadblocks a lesson.

t_ch: 喂！你要是闹出了什么动静，那判官肯定会再来的啦！
t_en: Hey! Don't cause a commotion or the judge will be on our case again for sure!

t_ch: 该去贿赂一下挡路的老爷了。
t_en: Can't we just bribe them?

t_ch: 云骑军军纪严明，你要是想贿赂，反倒是会被抓起来的。
t_en: Cloud Knights are well-disciplined — you'll just get yourself arrested.

t_ch: 只能是卖惨讲讲故事了。
t_en: Anyone got a good tear-jerker?

t_ch: 哪儿有让你说书的时间啊……
t_en: We don't have time for storytelling...

t_ch: 刚才我们路过了云骑军和药王秘传战斗过的地方，不是有一些躺倒的士兵吗……
t_en: ...Didn't we pass some soldiers resting on the way over here? Y'know, the place where the Cloud Knights and Disciples of Sanctus Medicus fought...

t_ch: 我们换上云骑军的盔甲?
t_en: Can we wear the Cloud Knights' armor?

t_ch: 这可是你的主意喔！
t_en: You said it, not me!

t_ch: 我们换上云骑军的盔甲?
t_en: Can we wear the Cloud Knights' armor?

t_ch: 这可是你的主意喔！
t_en: You said it, not me!

t_ch: 唔，给他们做些紧急治疗，换他们一身盔甲，应该很公平吧？
t_en: Hmm, a spot of emergency treatment in exchange for some armor. Sounds fair to me!

t_ch: …就按白露大人说的做吧。
t_en: ...Let's do what Lady Bailu suggested.

t_ch: 你们为伤重晕厥的云骑军进行了救治，又手忙脚乱凑齐合身的甲胄，穿在身上。
t_en: You gave medical treatment to the wounded Cloud Knights that have lost consciousness, then grabbed some armor and put it on.

t_ch: 咳咳咳…事不宜迟，走吧。
t_en: *coughing*... There's no time to lose. Let's go.

t_ch: 你们就说自己是押送我回丹鼎司的士兵，肯定不会露馅的。
t_en: Just tell them you're soldiers guiding me back to the Alchemy Commission — they won't know any better!

t_ch: 你要去哪里？我们还得抓紧时间通过那个哨卡呢！
t_en: Where are you going? We need to get through that sentry post pronto!

t_ch: 站住！这个小姑娘是干什么的？
t_en: Halt! What's with the kid?

t_ch: …你、你可听说过丹鼎司衔药龙女？
t_en: ...S—Surely you know the Healer Lady of Alchemy Commission?

t_ch: 仔细一看确实，头上有犄角，身后有尾巴……
t_en: Hmm... she does have horns and a tail...

t_ch: 我们要把她押送回丹鼎司。
t_en: We need to escort her back to the Alchemy Commission.

t_ch: 我听说过龙女大人总是喜欢偷偷跑出丹鼎司，没想到有幸见到本尊。
t_en: I heard the Dragon Lady liked to sneak away from the commission, but I never thought I'd have the honor of seeing her in person.

t_ch: 她是一只小龙人。
t_en: She's a dragon child.

t_ch: 我没有怀疑她的身份，你们是要将她押送回丹鼎司对吧？
t_en: I knew that! You're escorting her back to the Alchemy Commission, right?

t_ch: …没错。
t_en: ...Affirmative.

t_ch: 不嘛，不嘛，我还没有玩够呢，我不要回去，我不想回丹鼎司！
t_en: No, no! I haven't finished playing yet! I don't wanna go back to the Alchemy Commission!
Uh...

t_ch: 咳咳咳…最近的港口就在前面吗？
t_en: *coughing* Is the nearest harbor up ahead?

t_ch: 没错，这位士兵，你的身体状况好像不太好，前方有随行的军医……
t_en: That's right. You don't seem very well, soldier. We have a military doctor up ahead...

t_ch: 不必在意，我有龙女大人帮助。
t_en: Don't worry! I have the Dragon Lady with me.

t_ch: 我还要到处去吃吃喝喝，不要把我带走了呀，我不要回去！我不要回去——
t_en: I still wanna play! I'm hungry! Don't take me back — I don't wanna go back! I'm not going back!

t_ch: 放行！
t_en: Access granted!

t_ch: 你们二位辛苦了。
t_en: Good work, soldiers.

t_ch: 谢谢。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: 快快快，我们已经通过哨卡了，现在可以去那里把衣服换回去了。
t_en: Quick, we've passed through the sentry post, let's change back into our clothes.

t_ch: 怎样，本小姐那逼真的演出是不是很厉害，那可是本小姐哭过无数回练习出来的！
t_en: How was that? Wasn't my acting amazing? Let me tell you, a performance like that requires a lot of temper-tantrum practice!

t_ch: 那可真了不起啊。
t_en: That was incredible.

t_ch: 嗯哼！
t_en: Uh-huh!

t_ch: 那可真是丢人啊。
t_en: That was embarrassing.

t_ch: 喂！
t_en: Hey!

t_ch: 要是没有本小姐卖力假哭，你们肯定都过不了哨卡。
t_en: If I hadn't pretended to cry, you wouldn't have got through the sentry post.

t_ch: 话说回来，半夏姐姐还没有换好吗……
t_en: By the way, what's taking Banxia so long...?

t_ch: 咳咳…我这头盔…怎么…怎么已经取不下来了……
t_en: *coughing* Why can't I... take off... my helmet...?

t_ch: …我的声音…怎么会变成这样……
t_en: Why is my voice... like this...?

t_ch: 半夏费劲地想要将盔甲从身上取下来，但是盔甲却像是和她长在了一起。
t_en: Banxia is trying to take the armor off but failed. It sticks to her so tight as if it's part of her body.

t_ch: 你们帮我看一下…是不是什么卡住了……
t_en: Can you help me check...? It feels like something's caught...

t_ch: 魔阴身…
t_en: Mara-struck...

t_ch: 可是，她竟然还没有失去理智。
t_en: But she still has her senses.

t_ch: 你怎么了？
t_en: What's wrong?

t_ch: …魔阴身开始爆发了吗？这可真是…突然。
t_en: ...Has the mara taken hold? That was quite... sudden.

t_ch: 可是，我竟然还记得他，记得你们……
t_en: But I still remember him... and I remember both of you...

t_ch: 是白露大人的治疗生效了吗？谢谢你，要不是你……
t_en: Lady Bailu, is this a result of your healing? Thank you. If it weren't for you...

t_ch: 不许感谢我！…是我没能力…是我没法让你保持原来的样子。
t_en: Don't thank me! It's my fault... I couldn't preserve you the way you were.

t_ch: 魔阴身本就是无药可医的。我现在还能清醒地和你说话，已经是奇迹了。
t_en: You can't cure someone stricken with mara. It's already a miracle that I still have my senses... that I can talk to you.

t_ch: {F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，还记得我之前说过的话吗，万一到了那个时候……
t_en: Hey, do you still remember what I said earlier? If the time comes...

t_ch: 我没有忘记。
t_en: Yes, I remember.

t_ch: 现在是说这个时候吗？
t_en: Is now a good time for this?

t_ch: …走吧，趁我还有意识。
t_en: ...Let's go while I still have my senses.

t_ch: …等等，我的头有些晕。
t_en: ...Wait, I feel a bit dizzy.

t_ch: 我看看我该怎么办？阴阳表里，寒热虚实……
t_en: What should I do? Serious imbalances of yin and yang, cold and heat...

t_ch: …让我缓缓就行，白露大人，别忘了「交易」……
t_en: ...I just need a rest. Lady Bailu, don't forget our deal...

t_ch: 这个时候了还在说什么「交易」，那是约定，我会治好他的，你不要担心！
t_en: Stop calling it a deal! I made a promise — I'll heal him. Don't worry...

t_ch: 抱歉…为了我，把你们卷进了危险。
t_en: I'm so sorry... it's because of me that all of you are in danger.

t_ch: 你什么都不要说了，我会隔着头盔把药灌进去。
t_en: Enough talk. Here, I'll pour the medicine through the helmet.

t_ch: ……谢谢你，白露大人，不过我已经感觉不到皮肤与盔甲的间隙了。
t_en: ...Thank you, Lady Bailu... but I can't feel the gap between my skin and the helmet anymore.

t_ch: 我们到了，可是他还是不在吗？
t_en: We've arrived. Is he not here either?

t_ch: …他是一个谨慎的人，你还记得他的留言纸条吗？他要我「一个人前来」。
t_en: ...He's cautious by nature. Do you remember his note? He told me to "come alone."

t_ch: 可是你已经……
t_en: But you already...

t_ch: …你们站在这里他是不会出来的…咳咳咳，我来把他叫出来。白露大人，你们先避开吧，记得我们的约定……
t_en: ...He won't show himself if you're here... *coughing* I'll call out to him. Please, you two, find somewhere to hide. Remember our promise...

t_ch: 我记得。
t_en: I remember.

t_ch: 走吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 她还想再见最后一面。
t_en: She wants to see him for the last time.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我们走。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, let's go.

t_ch: 梁沐——
t_en: Liangmu...!

t_ch: 怪、怪物——
t_en: M—Monster...!

t_ch: 梁，沐……
t_en: Liang... mu...

t_ch: 救、救命啊——
t_en: H—Help...!

t_ch: 不好！我们赶紧过去。
t_en: Oh no! Let's hurry over.

t_ch: 我…不行啦……
t_en: I... can't hold on any longer...

t_ch: 动…动手吧，别忘了…承诺！
t_en: Do it... don't forget... the promise!

t_ch: 你说，半夏姐姐算是见到了她心上人最后一面了吗？
t_en: Do you think she saw him one last time?

t_ch: 应该算是见到了吧。
t_en: Seems likely.

t_ch: 那就好，那就好。
t_en: I hope so...

t_ch: 可惜对方不是这样认为的。
t_en: Yes, but I doubt he recognized her.

t_ch: 大人的情感真复杂……
t_en: Grownups are complicated, huh...

t_ch: 我们沿着这个方向去找吧，要去找到那个人。
t_en: Let's keep heading in this direction until we find him.

t_ch: 你们是药王秘传，还是十王司？我什么都没有做，你们别碰我！
t_en: Are you from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus or the Ten-Lords Commission? Don't touch me! I didn't do anything!

t_ch: 我们是半夏派来的。
t_en: Banxia sent us.

t_ch: 没错，本小姐是来帮你治病的。
t_en: That's right. I'm here to heal you.

t_ch: 这可由不得你了！
t_en: You don't get to decide that!

t_ch: 你就别再吓唬他了，这样戒备下去也没有什么用。
t_en: Stop trying to scare him! It won't help the situation.

t_ch: 我是半夏请来帮你治病的白露。
t_en: I'm Bailu. Banxia sent me to heal you.

t_ch: 你们可算是来了，刚才我被药王秘传追杀，又遇见了云骑军，仿佛听见半夏的声音，却碰到了一只怪物，真是倒霉！
t_en: *sigh* You're finally here... First I was being chased by the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, then I ran into the Cloud Knights. Then, I thought I heard Banxia's voice, but I ran straight into a monster. What a day!

t_ch: 你们既然是半夏派来的，那…半夏她人呢？她没有跟你们一起过来吗？
t_en: But if Banxia sent you, then... where is she? Isn't she with you?

t_ch: （{NICKNAME}你来决定，要不要告诉他事情的真相吧？）
t_en: ({NICKNAME}, what do you think? Should we tell him the truth?)

t_ch: 刚才的魔阴身怪物就是半夏。
t_en: That mara-struck monster just now was Banxia.

t_ch: 什么？！你说那只浑身全副武装的怪物就是半夏？别骗人了。
t_en: What!? That monster armed to the teeth? That was Banxia? You're lying.

t_ch: 是真的，为了见你，她不得不乔装打扮。
t_en: It's true. She had to disguise herself in order to meet you.

t_ch: 怎么会这样……
t_en: How is that possible...?

t_ch: 你们能带我再去…确认一下吗？
t_en: Could you take me there? ...Just to confirm?

t_ch: 半夏她有事情要忙，没有过来。
t_en: Banxia was busy — she couldn't make time to come.

t_ch: 是吗？唉，我就知道她在丹鼎司里忙不过来。
t_en: Is that so? *sigh* She's always so busy in the Alchemy Commission.

t_ch: 半夏…半夏姐姐她……
t_en: Miss Banxia... she...

t_ch: 小妹妹，你不要突然就哭了呀，这也没有什么呀。
t_en: Hey, little girl, no need for tears. It's no big deal.

t_ch: 我确实很想见到她，但是她要是在忙的话，我也不会强求的。半夏托你们来，她也有不能成行的苦衷吧。
t_en: I did want to meet Banxia, but I know how busy she is. She must have had a good reason for sending you.

t_ch: …我和半夏姐姐约定…我要帮她治好你。
t_en: I promised Banxia... that I'd heal you for her.

t_ch: 没事儿了，没事儿了…要不，你们也喘口气，一路上肯定不容易吧。
t_en: It's alright, it's alright... take a breath. You must've been through a lot to get here.

t_ch: 梁沐讲述了自己以为听见了半夏的呼喊，实际上却遇见了怪物的经历。
t_en: Liangmu narrates how he thought he heard Banxia shouting, but then ran into a monster.

t_ch: …这阵子罗浮仙舟上到处都有怪事，可能刚才也是。
t_en: ...Strange things are happening on the Luofu these days... What happened to you isn't so surprising.

t_ch: 可惜了，我还一直在等着她，没想到她还是没能走开。她有没有说有什么东西要带给我？
t_en: What a shame — I've been waiting for her for so long... I can't believe she couldn't make it. Did she ask you to bring me anything?

t_ch: 很遗憾，没有。
t_en: I'm afraid not.

t_ch: 她只是让白露来治疗你。
t_en: She just asked Bailu to heal you.

t_ch: 明白了，真正重要的东西，还是亲自见面说比较好。
t_en: I see. Well, it's good that you're here in person — this is no simple matter.

t_ch: 久闻衔药龙女的大名，那我就麻烦你帮我治疗了。
t_en: Your reputation precedes you, Healer Lady... Sorry to trouble you, please begin the healing whenever you're ready.

t_ch: 白露治好了这名化外民的病症，相比魔阴身，这不过是举手之劳。
t_en: Bailu healed the Outworlder. Compared to being Mara-struck, his illness is but a common disease.

t_ch: 治疗完成后，你们离开了流云渡，并通知云骑军收殓了那具「魔阴身士兵」的遗骸。
t_en: After finishing the treatment, you left Cloudford and asked the Cloud Knights to take care of the remains of the Mara-struck soldier.

t_ch: 半夏这女人…怎么会变成这副丑陋的样子？
t_en: ...This is Banxia? This hideous creature?

t_ch: 丑陋吗？你是不是太伤心了，一时难以接受？
t_en: Hey! I know you're probably in shock, but—

t_ch: 你们把路上发生的事情，都告诉了梁沐。
t_en: You tell Liangmu everything about what happened on the way over.

t_ch: 为了能见到梁沐最后一面，她穿上了脱不下的盔甲。
t_en: In order to see Liangmu for the very last time, she donned the armor that could never be taken off.

t_ch: 也就是说她换掉了衣服，那这具魔阴身怪物身上什么也搜不出来了。
t_en: She changed out of her original clothes, right? *sigh* There's no point in searching the body, then.

t_ch: 她有没有托付给你们什么秘密的盒子呀、信件什么的？
t_en: Did she give you any secret boxes or letters?

t_ch: 搜、搜什么东西呀？
t_en: S—Search for what?

t_ch: 你们也不知道吗…可恶，这不是什么都没留下嘛，臭婆娘耍我呀！
t_en: You don't know? Ugh, she left me with nothing. Was she playing me this whole time!?

t_ch: 她说要给你带去什么东西吗？
t_en: What did she say she'd bring you?

t_ch: 一份名单，一份有关「药王秘传」的组织名单。
t_en: A list of the names of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

t_ch: 有了这份名单的话，我既可以威胁药王秘传，拿到长生不老药；也可以上交云骑军，算是戴罪立功，不必被驱逐出仙舟了。
t_en: With that list I'd be able to blackmail the Disciples into giving me the elixir of immortality... or I could submit the list to the Cloud Knights to avoid banishment from the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 那个臭婆娘承诺了我无数遍，我好不容易才相信她，相信她能给我带来改变。
t_en: That woman promised me countless times... In the end, I finally trusted her — I genuinely thought she'd offer me change.

t_ch: 结果，最重要的事，她终究是没有办到…不对，她其实一开始就没能做到，肯定就是这样，你们也被骗了。
t_en: But in the end, she failed at the most important hurdle... or maybe she failed from the very beginning. She probably lied to you too.

t_ch: 她已经做到了。
t_en: She succeeded.

t_ch: 你们不会是被人骗了之后，还帮人数钱的那种人吧？我不相信。
t_en: Are you the type of people that help someone who tricked you? I don't think so.

t_ch: 长生是最重要的事情？
t_en: Is being immortal the most important thing for you?

t_ch: 这当然不是，我还有更重要的事情不在仙舟之上，求药或是长寿不过手段而已，我是不会在罗浮留下来的。
t_en: Of course not. I have more important matters in places other than the Xianzhou. Elixirs and immortality are just a means to an end. I won't stay on the Luofu.

t_ch: 难道她不是你的爱人吗？
t_en: Isn't she your sweetheart?

t_ch: 爱人？
t_en: Sweetheart?

t_ch: 那不过是她一厢情愿，我从没考虑过这样的事情。不会吧，难道你们也以为我是她的爱人吗？
t_en: That was her wishful thinking — I wasn't interested in the slightest. No way, you thought so too?

t_ch: 治疗……
t_en: Heal...

t_ch: 什么？
t_en: What?

t_ch: 让我赶紧治疗完你，然后你赶紧滚！
t_en: Let me heal you so I never have to lay eyes on you again!

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 还有什么治疗的必要吗？
t_en: Really? Do we still have to heal this guy?

t_ch: …这是我和半夏姐姐的约定。
t_en: ...I promised Banxia.

t_ch: 莫名其妙！我们都是被骗了的人，你应该向那个臭婆娘……
t_en: Ridiculous! That woman tricked all of us. You should've told her to take a—

t_ch: 现在，把，嘴，闭上——！
t_en: SHUT! YOUR! MOUTH!

t_ch: 莫名其妙！我们都是被骗了的人，你应该向那个臭婆娘……
t_en: Ridiculous! That woman tricked all of us. You should've told her to take a—

t_ch: 闭嘴！安静地让白露大人治疗你！
t_en: Just shut up and let Lady Bailu heal you!

t_ch: 我不准你站在半夏的旁边！
t_en: And move away from Banxia, now!

t_ch: 莫名其妙！我们都是被骗了的人，你应该向那个臭婆娘……
t_en: Ridiculous! That woman tricked all of us. You should've told her to take a—

t_ch: 现在，把，嘴，闭上——！
t_en: SHUT! YOUR! MOUTH!

t_ch: 白露不情愿地治好了这名化外民的病症，相比魔阴身，这不过是举手之劳。
t_en: Bailu healed the Outworlder begrudgingly. Compared to being Mara-struck, his illness is but a common disease.

t_ch: 治疗完成后，你们离开了流云渡，并通知云骑军收殓了那具「魔阴身士兵」的遗骸。
t_en: After finishing the treatment, you left Cloudford and asked the Cloud Knights to take care of the remains of the Mara-struck soldier.

t_ch: 等等，先让我狠狠地揍他一顿！
t_en: Wait, can I beat him up first?

t_ch: 妙啊！放开手脚来！无论你揍得多狠，我都能把他治好！
t_en: Great idea! Seeing as I'm due to heal him anyway... Do your worst!

t_ch: 那我就放心了！
t_en: Well said!

t_ch: 等等，你、你们要做什么？
t_en: Wait... wh—what are you doing?

t_ch: 你和白露狠狠地收拾了这名自称无辜的化外民。
t_en: You and Bailu taught this deceitful Outworlder a harsh but well-deserved lesson.

t_ch: 随后，白露又不情不愿地治好了这名化外民的病症，相比魔阴身，这不过是举手之劳。
t_en: Then, Bailu healed the Outworlder begrudgingly again. Compared to being Mara-struck, his illness is but a common disease.

t_ch: 治疗完成后，你们离开了流云渡，并通知云骑军收殓了那具「魔阴身士兵」的遗骸。
t_en: After finishing the treatment, you left Cloudford and asked the Cloud Knights to take care of the remains of the Mara-struck soldier.

t_ch: 很生气，很想发泄一下！
t_en: Ugh! I'm so furious!

t_ch: 早知道就不去救他了。
t_en: We wouldn't have helped him if we'd known.

t_ch: 那可不行，我已经答应半夏了。
t_en: That wouldn't do — I made a promise to Banxia.

t_ch: 我们对他还是太温柔了。
t_en: We were too gentle with him.

t_ch: 我虽然医好了那家伙的病，但是接下来<unbreak>30</unbreak>年，他每天都会不受控制地打嗝！
t_en: I healed him... but for the next thirty years he'll hiccup uncontrollably every day.

t_ch: …怎么了，觉得我做得不合适吗？
t_en: ...What? He deserved it!

t_ch: 很合适！
t_en: It's perfect!

t_ch: 惩罚太轻了！
t_en: That's way too light a punishment!

t_ch: 这点儿代价就当是他付给我的诊金吧，哼，便宜他了！
t_en: Hmph, that's the price he paid for my lenience. And it still wasn't enough!

t_ch: 本小姐姑且还在逃亡，你有没有什么推荐的好地方？
t_en: *sigh* Anyway, do you know any good hiding places? I'm still on the run...

t_ch: 浥尘客栈里先躲躲？
t_en: How about Petrichor Inn?

t_ch: 先去地衡司蹭蹭饭吧。
t_en: Let's get some food in the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: 听说过星穹列车吗？
t_en: Have you heard of the Astral Express?

t_ch: 唔，仙舟眼下乱做一团，我还是先待在星槎海吧。要是有人救急，想医个头疼脑热，我也能发挥所长。
t_en: Hmm, the Xianzhou is still in a mess. I better stay in Starskiff Haven for the time being — I'm sure there'll be fevers and headaches to take care of before long.

t_ch: 之前半夏问我喜不喜欢治病救人，说实话，原本这对我就像是吃饭睡觉，没啥难度，也就无所谓喜不喜欢了。
t_en: Banxia asked me if I liked treating people... Like I said, it's as easy as eating and drinking for me — I don't like or dislike it...

t_ch: 但是经历了这件事情之后，我反倒想，要是我对魔阴身的机理，更有了解就好了……
t_en: ...but this whole incident has made me wish I knew more about the mara-struck...

t_ch: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。有缘的话，咱们在星槎海的小吃摊见！再会！
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. May we meet again at the food stalls of Starskiff Haven! Bye!

t_ch: 我们没有告诉他，这样做，真的好吗？
t_en: We didn't tell him the truth. Was that really the right thing to do?

t_ch: 不知道呀。
t_en: I have no idea.

t_ch: 做选择，好难。
t_en: It's hard to decide sometimes.

t_ch: 别让自己后悔就行。
t_en: What's done is done, no need for regrets.

t_ch: 真的吗？我认识的一个大人物说，人生是由后悔组成的。
t_en: Really? A great person once told me that a person's life is made up of regrets.

t_ch: 对了，本小姐姑且还在逃亡，你有没有什么推荐的好地方？
t_en: *sigh* Anyway, do you know any good hiding places? I'm still on the run...

t_ch: 浥尘客栈里先躲躲？
t_en: How about Petrichor Inn?

t_ch: 先去地衡司蹭蹭饭吧。
t_en: Let's get some food in the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: 听说过星穹列车吗？
t_en: Have you heard of the Astral Express?

t_ch: 唔，仙舟眼下乱做一团，我还是先待在星槎海吧。要是有人救急，想医个头疼脑热，我也能发挥所长。
t_en: Hmm, the Xianzhou is still in a mess. I better stay in Starskiff Haven for the time being — I'm sure there'll be fevers and headaches to take care of before long.

t_ch: 之前半夏问我喜不喜欢治病救人，说实话，原本这对我就像是吃饭睡觉，没啥难度，也就无所谓喜不喜欢了。
t_en: Banxia asked me if I liked treating people... Like I said, it's as easy as eating and drinking for me — I don't like or dislike it...

t_ch: 但是经历了这件事情之后，我反倒想，要是我对魔阴身的机理，更有了解就好了……
t_en: ...but this whole incident has made me wish I knew more about the mara-struck...

t_ch: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。有缘的话，咱们在星槎海的小吃摊见！再会！
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. May we meet again at the food stalls of Starskiff Haven! Bye!

t_ch: 我有点后悔，没能早些和半夏一起出发。她求了我好久。
t_en: I regret that I didn't set off with Banxia earlier... She begged me for a long time.

t_ch: 上次去过了，到现在还欠着老板娘六百镝左右的饭钱…
t_en: I think I still owe the owner about <unbreak>600</unbreak> strales in unpaid food bills...

t_ch: 不成！地衡司的大哥大姐们虽然待人和气，但思想教育起来可烦人了。
t_en: No! The Realm-Keeping Commission people are polite, but they're always lecturing me.

t_ch: 列车…是什么？
t_en: Express... What's that?

t_ch: 六御已批复您的请求。
t_en: The Six Charioteers have replied to your request.

t_ch: 白露小姐停留丹鼎司…
t_en: Miss Bailu is currently at the Alchemy Commission...

t_ch: 您随时可以启行。
t_en: You may go at any time.

t_ch: 了解，辛苦浣溪小姐。
t_en: I understand. Thank you, Miss Huanxi.

t_ch: 谒见相关的事情已通传完毕，丹恒大人可有疑议？
t_en: I have delivered the missive about the meeting. Do you have any questions, Master Dan Heng?

t_ch: 我已清楚了，辛苦浣溪小姐。
t_en: I know all that I wish to know. Thank you, Miss Huanxi.

t_ch: 小姐的称谓可不敢当，妾身不过是白露小姐身边区区一个侍女罢了。但接下来我要向大人提出一个不情之请……
t_en: You need not address me as "Miss" — I am but one of Miss Bailu's maids. Then again, if I may be so bold as to make a humble request...

t_ch: 说吧。
t_en: Go ahead.

t_ch: 在此之前…请问这位是？
t_en: Before this goes ahead... Oh, who might this be?

t_ch: 看来，我来得不是时候。
t_en: Seems I came at a bad time.

t_ch: 幸会幸会，我是{NICKNAME}。
t_en: A pleasure to make your acquaintance. The name's {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 你就当我是个路灯吧！
t_en: Just imagine I'm a street lamp, barely even here!

t_ch: 抱歉，仙舟之上可没有旁听秘密的路灯。
t_en: I'm sorry, but Xianzhou street lamps aren't in the habit of eavesdropping on conversations.

t_ch: 我正与丹恒大人对谈，无关人等还请退避。
t_en: I'm speaking with Master Dan Heng. I'm afraid this doesn't involve you — please take your leave.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}是我的挚友，我邀请同行的见证人。视{F#她}{M#他}如我，开诚布公地说出你的要求。
t_en: {NICKNAME} is a close friend, I've invited {F#her}{M#him} along to bear witness. Please treat {F#her}{M#him} as you would me. Now, what was your request?

t_ch: 那么，我希望您不要和白露小姐见面。
t_en: Then, I hope you don't plan on meeting with Miss Bailu.

t_ch: 能讲一下不见面的理由吗？
t_en: Care to elaborate?

t_ch: 龙尊的侍女擅自帮主人挡客？
t_en: A High Elder's maid turning away guests without her master's knowledge?

t_ch: 白露小姐质朴天真，浑无心机。我等替她绸缪分忧，这才是侍者该为主人做的。
t_en: Bailu is simple and innocent, incapable of ill intent. It's natural for a servant to care for her master and share in her worries.

t_ch: 希望您听我把话说完，妾身绝不是在无理取闹。
t_en: Please hear what I have to say, I have good reason to be concerned.

t_ch: 也许您应该知道。白露小姐成为龙尊的过程既不合规制，也非她本人所愿——那是前代龙尊丹枫一意孤行的结果，他的骄妄专断造成了罗浮「龙尊传承」中绝。
t_en: Perhaps you should know that Miss Bailu's path to becoming a high elder was neither in compliance with proper protocol nor of her own volition — everything was a result of the stubbornness of her predecessor — Dan Feng. His hubris and tyranny brought about the end of the Luofu's high elder succession.

t_ch: 龙师们听闻了丹恒大人回来的消息，一时不知吉凶。但大家都在猜测，罗浮龙尊传承或将失而复得，重归一统，可喜可贺。
t_en: The Preceptors heard of Master Dan Heng's return, and were uncertain whether it constituted good or ill fortune. However, many have surmised that the Luofu's high elder succession tradition will soon be back in force. If true, that is indeed something worth celebrating.

t_ch: 无论是按族规另选贤能，或是…或是由您重摄其位，一切都有转圜余地。
t_en: Whether we find another suitable candidate in accordance with the laws of our people... or have you take up the position anew — everything can still be mended.

t_ch: 但是，丹恒大人若将一切交由白露小姐继承，恐将惹来巨大的风波，对她也绝无好处。
t_en: But, if Master Dan Heng were to hand everything over to Miss Bailu, it could lead to great upheavals on the horizon. No good would come of it for her.

t_ch: 另选贤能？持明族中意谁？
t_en: Another suitable candidate? Who does the Vidyadhara hope for?

t_ch: 呵呵，这样的大事自然由龙师长老们做主，妾身说不上来。
t_en: Hehe, such a major matter as this is naturally up to the Preceptor elders. I couldn't possibly say.

t_ch: 我看她也不是很想做龙尊。
t_en: I don't think she even wants to be the High Elder.

t_ch: 妾身十二年前被选为侍女，日日陪伴主人学医受训，见证她无数次出逃，又无数次不甘心地被抓回来。
t_en: I've been a maid here for twelve years now, and was with my mistress every day as she studied medicine and received tutelage. I've witnessed her countless escapes, and the inevitable unwilling returns.

t_ch: 以仙舟常情而论，她这样的孩子都过着快乐自在的童年。但身为空负虚衔的龙尊，白露小姐深受管束，进退全无自由可言。
t_en: As far as the Xianzhou is concerned, children like her enjoy a charmed and happy childhood. But as a high elder in nothing but name alone, Miss Bailu is highly restricted in her actions and has no freedom or say about her own life.

t_ch: 妾身深感不忍，斗胆请大人为这个孩子着想。
t_en: I can't bear it! Your Highness, please, think about this poor child!

t_ch: 这事不问问白露自己吗？
t_en: Shouldn't you ask Bailu herself about this?

t_ch: 白露小姐年轻识浅，易受他人摆布。只怕会在有心人的压力下，认为自己能肩负起这份责任。
t_en: Miss Bailu is young, naive, and easily manipulated by others. I worry that under the pressure of others, she would be convinced into taking up too great a burden.

t_ch: 你的意思，我听得很明白了。但眼下我无法答复。
t_en: I understand your concern... but I have nothing more to say on the matter at present.

t_ch: 那么，妾身先行告退了。
t_en: Then I will bid my farewell.

t_ch: 丹恒大人，无论您是要会见白露小姐，还是同妾身一道去参见龙师长老，我都会在去往鳞渊境的渡口等您到来。
t_en: Master Dan Heng, whether you choose to meet Miss Bailu or go with me to see the Preceptor elders, I will be waiting for you by the ferry leading to Scalegorge Waterscape.

t_ch: 还没见上白露一面，就有人来劝我打退堂鼓。
t_en: I haven't even set eyes on Bailu, and people are already urging me not to meet her...

t_ch: 终于能知道丹恒的过去了！
t_en: Finally, we can learn about Dan Heng's past!

t_ch: 你和三月相处太久了……
t_en: ...You've been spending too much time with March.

t_ch: 需要我向其他人保密吗？
t_en: Should I keep this a secret from the others?

t_ch: 不必。有三月在，什么也瞒不住啊。
t_en: No need. March will find out sooner or later.

t_ch: 你知道我是罗浮持明的后裔，也曾在鳞渊境里见过我…「隐藏的力量」。
t_en: You know that I'm a descendant of the Luofu Vidyadhara. In Scalegorge Waterscape, you witnessed my... "secret strength," as March would call it...

t_ch: 但这份力量本不属于我，而是来自我的前世之身，丹枫。他擅自改变了龙尊传承，酿成大祸，也最终遭受蜕鳞轮回之刑。
t_en: ...yet that power stems from Dan Feng — my previous incarnation. He altered the process of high elder succession, plunging everything into catastrophe... ultimately, he suffered the punishment of molting rebirth.

t_ch: 按照持明轮回再世的生理，我该成为全新的个体。而以法度论，前世罪业应一笔勾销。
t_en: Based on the physiological principles of Vidyadhara reincarnation, I ought to have been an entirely new entity... and in view of the law, all crimes from my previous incarnation should have been wiped clean...

t_ch: 现实却是：自诞生起我就被羁押在幽囚狱中。就算获释离开仙舟，龙尊的过去与丹枫的{RUBY_B#刃}仇敌{RUBY_E#}仍如影随形。
t_en: ...but in reality, I was locked up in The Shackling Prison at birth. Even after I was released and left the Xianzhou, my high elder past and Dan Feng's {RUBY_B#Blade}enemies{RUBY_E#} pursued me like a haunting shadow.

t_ch: 如今我打算重拾旧事。我想以修复「建木」封印为交换，顺道谒见龙尊，看看能做些什么。
t_en: Now, I plan to face that shadow. In order to make amends, I want to repair the Ambrosial Arbor's seal... and visit the high elder, to see what more I can do.

t_ch: 星槎已备好了，走吧。
t_en: The starskiff's ready. Let's go.

t_ch: 传言没错，你果然回来了…
t_en: The rumors are true — you really are back...

t_ch: 我是丹鼎司医士陆英，如你所见，也是个持明族人。我听闻大罪人的转世之身重返罗浮，想来见上一面，给个忠告。
t_en: I'm healer Luying of the Alchemy Commission — I'm a Vidyadhara too, as you can see. I'd heard the reincarnation of the great sinner has returned to the Luofu... and wanted to offer some advice.

t_ch: 哦？
t_en: Oh?

t_ch: 立刻离开这个是非之地。
t_en: Leave this troubled place immediately.

t_ch: 看来持明族人很不喜欢你。
t_en: Looks like the Vidyadhara aren't big fans of yours.

t_ch: 我一点也不意外。那么，丹鼎司的要求是？
t_en: ...I'm not surprised in the slightest. What does the Alchemy Commission want, then?

t_ch: 做回你的无名客，别再搅动龙尊传承这潭浑水。
t_en: Return to being a Nameless — stay out of the high elder succession.

t_ch: 罗浮持明好不容易自丹枫的罪孽中恢复过来，也有了白露这样慈悲好生的龙尊。而今你回来，不但于事无补，反而激起龙师们权争的野心。
t_en: The Luofu Vidyadhara have finally recovered from Dan Feng's grievous sins, and were blessed with a compassionate and caring high elder in Bailu... none of this was easy. Your return has stirred up resentment and ambition among the Preceptors, and threatens our situation.

t_ch: 你也是来关心龙尊传承的？
t_en: Are you here about the high elder succession, too?

t_ch: 当然！自从白露小姐继任，非议之声不绝。但丹鼎司深信那孩子是块了不得的璞玉，慈悲好生，远胜丹枫百倍。
t_en: Certainly! Miss Bailu has weathered nothing but criticism since she was granted the title, but the Alchemy Commission firmly believes that girl to be a precious diamond in the rough. She is compassionate, kind, and a hundred times better than Dan Feng.

t_ch: 何况丹枫选了她成为龙尊，那她便是罗浮持明的领袖。命运使然，奉其为尊，我等心甘情愿。
t_en: Moreover, Dan Feng selected her as high elder, making her the leader of the Luofu Vidyadhara. Fate chose her as our sovereign, and we bowed down before that destiny.

t_ch: 但如今你回到罗浮，事情却不同了。龙师们又兴起更易人选的念头，只会为白露小姐带来麻烦。
t_en: Now that you're back, everything has changed. The Preceptors are starting to think of finding other candidates, which means nothing but trouble for Miss Bailu.

t_ch: 我无意动摇白露的地位。
t_en: I have no intention of threatening Bailu's position.

t_ch: 就算你自问无愧，只要你还在罗浮，便会受种种看不见的力量裹挟。离开，才是对所有人好的选择。
t_en: You may have a clear conscience, but even so... As long as you remain on the Luofu, invisible forces will try to coerce you. Leave now. It's the best outcome for everyone involved.

t_ch: 前生之过，今世切莫重蹈。告辞了。
t_en: Do not repeat the mistakes of a past life in this one. Farewell.

t_ch: 请问两位是要前往丹鼎司洞天吗？
t_en: Excuse me, are you two on your way to the Alchemy Commission delve?

t_ch: 出发。
t_en: Depart.

t_ch: 再等等。
t_en: Wait.

t_ch: 两位好啊。波月古海今日风高浪急，两位怎么有雅兴到此一游？
t_en: Hello, what brings you two here? The wind and waves are restless around Lunarescent Depths today.

t_ch: 将军也是来劝我放弃谒见龙尊的吗？
t_en: Even you came to dissuade me from visiting the high elder, General?

t_ch: 哈哈，那与我何干？我是受龙女照拂，在丹鼎司疗伤养病，赶巧撞上两位。
t_en: Haha, this encounter was not of my making. I've been recuperating in the Alchemy Commission under the Dragon Lady's care — our paths have merely crossed...

t_ch: 你既有此一问，看来成行前已有人来打过照面了？
t_en: ...but your question would suggest that there are others interested in dissuading you from such a venture.

t_ch: 那是，不止一波，各怀目的。
t_en: Yes — many. Each with their own agenda in mind.

t_ch: 见个面而已，有这么复杂吗？
t_en: It's just a quick meeting. What's the big deal?

t_ch: 事关持明一族的兴衰去向，有心人自然要生起左右它的念头。丹枫如此，龙师们如此，培养龙女的丹鼎司，亦不外如是。
t_en: Matters that concern the rise and fall of the Vidyadhara will inevitably attract certain parties — those that would work circumstances to their advantage. Be it Dan Feng, the Preceptors, or the Alchemy Commission that trained the Dragon Lady...

t_ch: 将军在此养病，倒是对谁见了我们一清二楚。
t_en: Your injury hasn't dulled your instincts, general — the Preceptors and the Commission seem deeply concerned.

t_ch: 相请不如偶遇，我替各位参详参详这些人的来意，如何？
t_en: A chance meeting is a gift from fate. Why don't I help you to fathom their intent, then?

t_ch: 持明长老希望另选龙尊。
t_en: The Vidyadhara elders want to choose a new High Elder.

t_ch: 呵呵，龙师与龙尊的权争，自古至今相持不休。而到丹枫这一任，强势如他，完全摆脱了长老们的掣肘，令其敢怒不敢言。
t_en: Haha, the power struggle between the Preceptors and their High Elder is a tale as old as time. And someone as powerful as Dan Feng, who was completely beyond their control, was enough for them to harbor a hidden rage.

t_ch: 原本长老们在继任龙尊一事上还有扳回一城的发言权。孰料丹枫自定人选。事实既成，他们只能接受这样的结果。
t_en: The elders used to have a small say in appointing the new High Elder. Who could have imagined that Dan Feng would pick his own successor? And yet, that is precisely what happened, and all they could do was accept the result.

t_ch: 而今丹恒回归，长老又看到了一个机会，岂能放过？
t_en: Now that Dan Heng has arrived, the elders see yet another chance — how could they let it go?

t_ch: 大胆！
t_en: Pretty bold of them!

t_ch: 哈哈哈，持明族的规制，我们外人无从评判。
t_en: Haha! Us outsiders should not judge the laws of the Vidyadhara.

t_ch: 合理！
t_en: Seems reasonable!

t_ch: 龙女没有力量，丹枫一介罪人，另选龙尊合情合理。
t_en: The Dragon Lady has no power and Dan Feng is a criminal. One can understand their desire for a new high elder.

t_ch: 龙师被弹压已久，难免会做些小动作。
t_en: The Preceptors have been suppressed for some time now — they will inevitably try to overturn the situation.

t_ch: 丹鼎司希望龙尊仍旧是白露。
t_en: The Alchemy Commission hopes that Bailu can stay on as High Elder.

t_ch: 这些人自诩「正统」。他们认为白露是由上一任龙尊亲自选定的继承者，若不犯大错，龙师们无权另选。
t_en: These people speak of "legitimacy." They believe that Bailu was chosen as heir apparent by the previous High Elder, and that unless she were to commit a terrible sin, the Preceptors should have no right whatsoever to choose again.

t_ch: 「衔药龙女」兼有龙相形貌和不可思议的疗愈之能。有人将这视为龙尊的证明。不过，信奉力量的龙师长老们却不愿接受……
t_en: The Healer Lady has draconic features and scarcely believable therapeutic abilities. Some regard this as evidence that she is the High Elder. But the Preceptors are fixated on strength, and are unwilling to accept her...

t_ch: 而在你眼前这位「丹枫转世」敕令了波月古海的万顷海水之后，那些捍卫「龙尊正统」的人就更加不安了。
t_en: Now that Dan Feng's reincarnation has shown a command over the vast marine expanse of Lunarescent Depths, those longing to keep the traditional bequeathal of the High Elder feel increasingly uneasy.

t_ch: 保守！
t_en: Very conservative of them!

t_ch: 继丹枫逊位后，他们抗衡龙师，维持白露的体面，也算是苦心孤诣了。
t_en: After Dan Feng's abdication, they fought against the Preceptors and saved Bailu's dignity. They demonstrated a true devotion.

t_ch: 合理！
t_en: Very reasonable!

t_ch: 在丹恒到来前，一切风平浪静。他们想赶走丹恒，倒也确实合理。
t_en: Before Dan Heng arrived, everything was quiet as a windless lake. In that regard, it is understandable that they want to get rid of him.

t_ch: 这些人多半不会善罢甘休吧。
t_en: These folks aren't the type to just let it go.

t_ch: 将军，你怎么看这事？
t_en: General, what do you think about this?

t_ch: 这是持明内务，只要无损于罗浮的太平，云骑将军能有什么看法？
t_en: It is an internal affair of the Vidyadharas. As long as it does not disturb the peace aboard the Luofu, it does not involve the general of the Cloud Knights.

t_ch: 但作为朋友，我仍要提醒一句。只要身负「龙尊之力」的丹恒与身负「龙尊头衔」的白露一日并立于罗浮上，持明的内部对立就不会停止…尽管这并非你们二位的错。
t_en: Nevertheless, as a friend, let me remind you of one thing. So long as Dan Heng and Bailu, with their respective High Elder powers and titles, both remain on the Luofu, the Vidyadhara will never cease their internal strife. This is not to say that either of you are to blame.

t_ch: 时候不早了，你不是打算去鳞渊境修复「建木」封印，顺道谒见那位龙尊吗？快些走吧。我也得老实养病了……
t_en: It's getting late. You are headed to repair the Arbor's seal at Scalegorge Waterscape, and visit the High Elder, no? Farewell, for now. I should start taking this business of rest and recuperation a little more seriously.

t_ch: 丹恒大人，您来了。您是否做出决定了？
t_en: Master Dan Heng, you're back. Have you made your decision?

t_ch: 是先随我同长老们会面？还是…去见白露小姐？
t_en: Will you come with me to meet with the elders first? Or... are you set on seeing Miss Bailu?

t_ch: 白露小姐已在鳞渊境等候了。
t_en: Miss Bailu is already waiting at Scalegorge Waterscape.

t_ch: 您的固执确有几分丹枫的影子。
t_en: Your stubbornness is redolent of your previous incarnation.

t_ch: 抱歉，你们哪里也去不了。
t_en: Sorry, but you're not going anywhere.

t_ch: 中绝传承的罪人，不配踏入持明族的圣地。
t_en: A criminal who destroyed our succession is unworthy of setting foot in the sacred places of the Vidyadhara.

t_ch: 诸位，丹恒先生踏入鳞渊境一事已得到六御和龙师长老们首肯。何况他早已不是当年的罪人……
t_en: Wait. Master Dan Heng's presence at Scalegorge Waterscape has been approved by the Six Charioteers and the Preceptors. He is no longer the criminal he once was...

t_ch: 巧舌如簧。他究竟是不是那个罪人，试试便知！
t_en: Empty rhetoric, there are ways of unearthing his true identity...
